series_metadata.series_description: Records necessary forusing the system: user guides, system or sub-system definitions, system flowcharts, program descriptions and documentation, job control or work flow records, system specifications, and input and output specifications

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 3 years after discontinuance of system and until all system data is destroyed or transferred to new operating environment, then destroy. If all data is not destroyed or transferred, review specifications by State Archives prior to disposal. ; Paper: Retain for 3 years after discontinuance of system and until all system data is destroyed or transferred to new operating environment, then destroy. If all data is not destroyed or transferred, review specifications by State Archives prior to disposal., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Trash
